description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy modeled after the Pokémon character Eevee, featuring large, upright ears with dark inner linings and a bushy, white-tipped tail. The toy has a soft, light brown body with a creamy white ruff around its neck, and its face is adorned with large, shiny black eyes, a small black nose, and a pink, open-mouthed smile. The surface appears to be made of a soft, matte fabric, likely polyester or similar plush material, with visible stitching around the neck ruff and tail. The toy is proportioned with a rounded head and body, short legs, and a prominent tail, giving it a cute and approachable appearance. There are no visible accessories or clothing, and the toy is designed to be lightweight and easily handled. Its overall finish is smooth and inviting, making it suitable for children or collectors in an urban environment.
description: A soft, plush Eevee stuffed toy with large ears, a bushy white-tipped tail, and a friendly, smiling face. The toy features a light brown body, creamy neck ruff, and shiny black eyes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the smiling face, large upright ears, and fluffy neck ruff, with both front legs visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, one ear, the full length of the bushy tail, and the rounded body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, both ears, the white ruff, and the full tail with its white tip.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side of the face, ear, and the tail's curve.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with large, wide-open black eyes and a small, open pink mouth suggesting a smile. The eyebrows are slightly arched, enhancing the toy's approachable and happy demeanor.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright on all four legs with the head slightly raised and ears perked up, giving an alert and lively appearance.
